safestringlib
=============

# Available modules


The overview below shows which safestringlib installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using safestringlib, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load safestringlib/20250325-GCC-14.3.0
```
